title: uentflds
text: uentflds Return the number of fields in the specified entity parameter. Explain this code long uentflds (UHACT hEnt, long* numFlds ); Copy Parameters hEnt Handle to the entity parameter. numFlds Number of fields in the entity parameter. (Output) Return Values Table 1. Values returned by uentflds Value Meaning 0 Success -165 The supplied handle is not valid. Use Library: ucall Description uentflds returns (by reference) the number of fields in the specified entity parameter. You do not have to have a current occurrence, or any occurrence at all, to do this. Note that you need to supply a pointer to a long variable, even though the number of fields in an entity is limited and could easily fit in an int or even a short variable. Was this topic helpful?
